description: Passed my PhD Qualifying Examination. Thank you Dr. Mimi Xie (https://sites.google.com/view/mxie), Dr. Dakai Zhu (https://www.cs.utsa.edu/~dzhu/), and Dr. Wei Wang (https://wwang.github.io/)!
Paper "Optimizing Task Scheduling in Fog Computing with Deadline Awareness" accepted at the 2nd IEEE Conference on Secure and Trustworthy CyberInfrastructure for IoT and Microelectronics (SaTC 2026).
Began Research Assistantship at ASIC Laboratory, University of Texas at San Antonio.
Paper "QTE-IoT: Q-Learning-Based Task Scheduling Scheme to Enhance Energy Consumption and QoS in IoT Environments" published in Sustainable Computing: Informatics and Systems Journal.
Paper "Controller placement in software-defined networks using reinforcement learning and metaheuristics" published in Cluster Computing: The Journal of Networks, Software Tools and Applications.
Event "DAC 2025" presentation on research and networking.
Paper "Controller placement in software-defined networks using reinforcement learning and metaheuristics" accepted at Cluster Computing: The Journal of Networks, Software Tools and Applications.
Milestone "Ph.D. in Computer Science at University of Texas at San Antonio" began with a focus on IoT and Edge AI systems.
